# Longhorn Baja Racing

> Official website for The University of Texas at Austin Baja SAE student engineering team.

Longhorn Baja Racing is a student-led organization at The University of Texas at Austin in Austin, Texas. The team designs, builds, tests, and races a single-seat off-road vehicle in Baja SAE collegiate engineering competitions.

## Key Topics

- Baja SAE and collegiate motorsports
- Off-road vehicle design, manufacturing, testing, and competition
- Mechanical, automotive, electrical, and software engineering
- Student leadership, sponsorship, and hands-on engineering education

## Site Sections

- About: https://longhornbajaracing.com/#about
- Engineering and operations subteams: https://longhornbajaracing.com/#team
- Team leadership: https://longhornbajaracing.com/#members
- Merchandise preview: https://longhornbajaracing.com/#merch
- Sponsors and partners: https://longhornbajaracing.com/#sponsors
